# 新闻速递 2026-03-19

## Shopee
- Lakehouse Capital增持Sea Limited（Shopee母公司）1432万美元ADR，或预示机构看好其长期增长潜力。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）
- Shopee马来西亚斋戒月推出免费咖啡游戏促销，或旨在提升用户活跃度及市场份额。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）
- Shopee马来西亚站销售Berkley FireLine钓鱼线，或反映其持续拓展平台商品品类。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimAFBVV95cUxOc2pqdG1wTTlfOVdFdVNCZkdCUm1KVVczSlE0YllxdUc1M2JDT3FuUUhSQTdzVDJueS0yZzZDa3VwdTZoWnhKTUFHd2xhR1pQUFJ6NzVMZjNzT0V5YzFxX2x2RWp5YWlpOXZ3U0t1alFHdzVCY29USmtfM3J0SENENUFocTZ1NnlOWU40N1lSSzhzTnQyOV93SA?oc=5)）

## Coupang
- Coupang股价周三上涨，或受市场积极情绪及特定催化剂驱动。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMioAFBVV95cUxONlJ1Z3dhY3Vpcng1bFJ6YmszeW5XMzYxVWJCa1k4eTIzUEpkZlpNdkZZNE1CX3NxSlJqam1ZRkdDbjlHTFl1cmRKeVRmTXFfWjB0R1phTFY0TnBoQ0RNV2ZWUUtxQWM2SmpjYUxFUHRUM29hM3E2NE9tREhYdGgxWWRtYkNqR0FPX1hJajFjMzlXYWUwQ2szWnFjeVJEc1lr?oc=5)）
- Coupang联手英伟达提升“火箭配送”效率，或将通过技术升级强化物流优势。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinwFBVV95cUxNNmlYZHZVd0tVbEhwSC12a2UxQW83cmQxUzVzMEdoeC1CcE43Zm1WTXNrSXRYVkJ2YWxyQzNRWHJCN0lkSXVwM19VRjFQV2dUSnVGRklvNi1UQmU4VHVkRmVUS0VvaW03RnR4VVVWRzhuUUVDeXBNT2ljUEZKMDFndno3TnhyY2dpNzctSFBaN280TTNJWHRmQWxoMDdHNkU?oc=5)）
- Coupang携手英伟达共建AI驱动物流“工厂”，或加速其智能化供应链升级并提升运营效率。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinAFBVV95cUxQT2V2MlZOSTYtdVpDVUw5bTN1dXlJRmJMOWNnQ1hScmpzaUMxVlJ0Zk5kT2h4UXlndjFITDVvVWVKbHpsSHdVekdRLWlSXzRra2R1eGlCbmd5VTVnNmhZaEVyaDktLVpubU5GSUd5ZlBtUkhXdlp3MmRhOE5XM01MQ2NkS1BBOE4xLURreF85YWN0Q0V0dmwyeXdWNnE?oc=5)）
- Coupang股价受与英伟达AI物流合作提振小幅上涨，或反映市场对技术赋能物流前景的认可。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinAFBVV95cUxQSTI5S09fVEZWbTQ0U0dSVFExaTBPci1zT2d3bjdUZ0lUV1lTcWpxV09kQmZUcml1amhYVDVzR21wX2Q0amtSdXRZQW84M0g1Rlk3MDhKYTlZUU1sRjNNM0hYLUtSTVJ5c2FmN001d3BDMk41bEVXbkF5UDhXQzdmdlV3YWVaRTN4V0cxRUR3WVBoS0ZuWjl1ZWdGUDY?oc=5)）

## Tencent
- 腾讯、字节跳动、阿里巴巴集体“养龙虾”，或预示中国互联网巨头寻求新增长点及业务多元化。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiU0FVX3lxTE5uT3pDY0J5Nk1DMHZOSkRrX3owQTVuN1FkUHl1QTNyNmdlekIxdGF0VnYzM3NUMjRLNkpDQkVRRzVVYko3ZFZZUmtEak1ma3hCMEFN?oc=5)）

## AppLovin
- AppLovin因自助服务及电商广告业务进展获市场关注，或助力其估值提升与营收增长。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）
